title: Rocket Lab Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results, Posts Record Quarterly Revenue of $180M, Record Annual Revenue of $602M
text: Rocket Lab reported record financial performance for 2025, achieving several significant milestones in both commercial and defense sectors. The company delivered quarterly revenue of $180 million and full-year revenue of $602 million, representing 38% year-over-year growth. According to founder and CEO Sir Peter Beck, 2025 was a record-breaking year for Rocket Lab financially and operationally. The backlog reached $1.85 billion, up 73% year-on-year, positioning the company for continued expansion. Rocket Lab completed 21 Electron and HASTE missions in 2025 with a 100% success rate. The company secured over 30 new launch contracts from diverse customers spanning national defense, commercial constellations, and other sectors. A major development was the $816 million contract from the Space Development Agency to design and manufacture 18 advanced spacecraft for the Tracking Layer Tranche 3 program. For Q1 2026, Rocket Lab projects revenue between $185-$200 million, representing 57% year-over-year growth at the midpoint. The company expects adjusted EBITDA losses between $21-$27 million during this period.
